creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
- Update to 5.14
> How-To-Repeat:
> Fix:

--- www/MT.patch begins here ---
--- /usr/ports/www/MT/distinfo	2012-05-22 08:29:55.000000000 +0900
+++ www/MT/distinfo	2012-06-28 11:47:19.000000000 +0900
@@ -6,3 +6,5 @@
 SIZE (MTOS-5.14-fr.tar.gz) = 6232066
 SHA256 (MTOS-5.14-ja.tar.gz) = b9f5c2a9dcc94f029dc214702b98ad32334864dc0ea917fcc010ae5c7a64c4cc
 SIZE (MTOS-5.14-ja.tar.gz) = 6226249
+SHA256 (MTOS-5.14-ru.tar.gz) = 58cdc4e5e40ed59e2b5b3ff28d41dac4ebabf46689ff973328a1ab94c28b7549
+SIZE (MTOS-5.14-ru.tar.gz) = 6419868
diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/MT/pkg-plist www/MT/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/www/MT/pkg-plist	2012-05-22 08:29:55.000000000 +0900
+++ www/MT/pkg-plist	2012-06-28 11:54:08.000000000 +0900
@@ -2246,6 +2246,7 @@
 %%CGIDIR%%/lib/MT/Template/Context/Search.pm
 %%CGIDIR%%/lib/MT/Template/Context.pm
 %%CGIDIR%%/lib/MT/Template.pm
+%%LANG_RU%%%%CGIDIR%%/lib/MT/Template.pm~
 %%CGIDIR%%/lib/MT/TaskMgr.pm
 %%CGIDIR%%/lib/MT/Task.pm
 %%CGIDIR%%/lib/MT/Tag.pm
--- www/MT.patch ends here ---

--- russian/MT.patch begins here ---
--- /usr/ports/russian/MT/Makefile	2012-03-16 08:58:39.000000000 +0900
+++ russian/MT/Makefile	2012-06-28 11:45:18.000000000 +0900
@@ -11,8 +11,6 @@

 COMMENT=	Russian localization of the MovableType publishing system

-IGNORE=		source file not found
-
 PROJECTHOST=	movabletype
 MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../www/MT
 MT_LANG=	${PKGNAMEPREFIX:S,-,,}
--- russian/MT.patch ends here ---
